---
title: "Last before lockdown"
date: 2020-03-21
categories: ["halton-rapids","club: lancaster","whitewater"]
image: https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/BROiNf7oTPlR-eQfZYAKi-PjrvGfs82PcXhjbjA14CM-768x511.jpg
---

- Distance: 4.6 km
- [Strava](https://www.strava.com/activities/3203692017)

Small group paddle with Paul & Darren. Halton was on a high-low a perfect playground. Practised ferry gliding at the top and bow rudders and S turns by the islands. Just one run but a long one. We took our tea and sandwiches down to the new steps. A much needed day out.

![](https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/BROiNf7oTPlR-eQfZYAKi-PjrvGfs82PcXhjbjA14CM-768x511.jpg)
